info.title: ComposeBastion API
info.description: ComposeBastion API contract. Stable JSON endpoints are available under /api/v1 while legacy /api routes remain compatible during the V1 transition.

get.summary: List active sessions for current user
Preview removable and blocked Docker images
Read redacted/full container inspect details by role

post.summary: Retry a failed or canceled operation job
Test a recovery backup target connection
Analyze one app recovery readiness score
Find the saved recovery profile for an app

put.summary: Create or update an app recovery profile

post.summary: Enqueue a clone-only recovery restore drill

get.summary: List recent alert channel test history
